title: Deep Space Object
editorialSummary: Every card is a deep-space object name. The grouping is by object TYPE — not by constellation or discovery method. The false trail: Andromeda is a galaxy AND a constellation; Orion Nebula is in Orion but is a nebula not a star cluster; Pleiades looks like a nebula name but is an open cluster. Players who sort by constellation will fail. The correct axis is strictly object type: nebulae, galaxies, star clusters, and supernova remnants.
